description_long: This object is a residential complex featuring multiple single-story houses arranged symmetrically around a central courtyard with a large swimming pool. The houses are surrounded by white perimeter walls and have flat or gently sloped roofs in shades of beige and terracotta. The complex includes paved walkways, green lawns, and a dedicated parking area with marked spaces and street access. There are additional amenities such as a tennis or basketball court and a communal building, possibly for recreation or administration. Street lamps and signage are present along the perimeter, enhancing the urban neighborhood feel. The overall layout is organized, modern, and designed for communal living with private and shared spaces.
description: A modern residential complex with multiple single-story houses, a central pool, sports court, and parking area, all enclosed by white walls and green lawns.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the complex from the side, highlighting the central pool, surrounding houses, and the sports court on the right.
description_view_1: View 1 provides a direct look at the main entrance, parking area, and the symmetrical arrangement of houses around the pool.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear of the complex, with the communal building and additional green spaces visible.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the back entrance, showing the sports court, parking, and the full extent of the perimeter wall.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide gate, paved approach, and minimal overhang, with direct access to the parking area and walkways.
